text: Week$1,$Thursday:$Axilla,$Brachial$Plexus$ Task$1:$Boundaries$of$the$Axilla$ • Apex%of%the%axilla:%area%bound%by%first%rib,%clavicle%and%scapula.% • Anterior%Wall:%Pectoralis%major%and%minor% • Posterior%Wall:%Latissimus%Dorsi% • Medial%Wall:%Serratus%Anterior.% • Axilla%contains%axillary%blood%vessels,%brachial%plexus,%fat%and%lymph%nodes.% • Pectoralis%minor%divides%axillary%artery%into%its%parts.% Task$2:$Brachial$Plexus$ See%lecture%2.% Task$3:$Osteology$ Radius% • Disk%like%head%fits%into%capitulum% • Radial%tuberosity%–%biceps%insert%here%on%the%rough%surface% • Interosseus%border%(sharp%edge)%on%medial%side% • Dorsal%tubercle%(on%posterior%inferior%side)% • Styloid%process%at%bottom%end%(See%Lab%3)% • During%full%flexion%the%radial%head%fits%in%the%radial%fossa% • % Ulna% • Olecranon%(posterior)%with%trochlear%notch.% o Fits%into%trochlea%fossa% • Coronoid%process%that%fits%into%coronoid%fossa.% • The%humeroulnar%joint%is%the%main%joint%of%the%elbow.% % % % % % % % % % % % % % Task%4:%Muscles% Anterior(Compartment( Muscles% Origin% Insertion% Action% Nerve% % Biceps%Brachii% Long(head(from(supraglenoid( tubercle(into(bicipital(groove,(short( head(from(coracoid(process.( Radial(tuberosity( Flex(arm(when(extended( Supinate(arm(when(flexed( Musculocutaneous( Brachialis% Anterior(surface(of(humerus( Coronoid(process(and( tuberosity(of(ulnar( Powerful(flexor( Coracobrachialis% Coracoid(process( Middle(of(humerus(shaft( ( ( Posterior(Compartment( Muscles% Origin% Insertion% Action% Nerve% % Triceps%Brachii% long(head:(infraglenoid(tubercle(of(scapula( lateral(and(medial(head:(posterior(humerus( Olecranon(process(of(ulna.( ( ( ( Extend(arm( Radial( Aconeus% Lateral(epicondyle( Inserts(into(olecranon(and( posterior(of(ulna( ( ( ( !
